diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,177 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: ./accepts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Safe summary: Export accepts helper from accepts directory
+
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts, defaultMatch
+- Reads as: ../../utils/accept (parseAccept), ../../utils/headers (AcceptHeader)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Accept header matching utility for content negotiation
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: globalThis, navigator.userAgent, Deno.env.toObject
+- Neighbor files: (none)
+- Safe summary: Runtime detector for identifying execution environment
+
+## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo
+- Reads as: ./types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
+- Safe summary: Type export for connection info helper
+
+## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
+- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType, GetConnInfo
+- Reads as: ../../context
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Type definitions for connection and network address information
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
+- Reads as: ../../utils/cookie (parse, parseSigned, serialize, serializeSigned)
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/cookie/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie reading, writing, signing and deletion helpers with prefix support
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/dom/css, ../../utils/html, ./common
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/jsx/dom/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper with scoped class names, keyframes, and view transitions
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify
+- Reads as: (standalone)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Core CSS utilities for class naming, string building, and minification
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/hono/index.ts, src/types/index.ts, src/utils/color/index.ts, src/utils/handler/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Dev-time utilities for displaying routes and inspecting app structure
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: src/hono/index.ts, src/hono-base/index.ts, src/types/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory for creating Hono app instances with handler composition
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML escaping and template helper with value interpolation
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception/index.ts, src/utils/headers/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy fetch wrapper with header sanitization and RFC compliance
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts, src/types/index.ts, src/utils/url/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Route inspection utilities for matched handlers, paths, and base paths
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ToSSG, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Static site generation helper with plugins for static rendering
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: './utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Middleware for SSG context, dynamic route handling, and disabling SSG
+
+## src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Main exports or names: defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, SSGPlugin
+- Reads as: (standalone)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: Built-in SSG plugins for request/response hooks
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGInterface
+- Reads as: ./middleware (constants, SSGParams), ./utils, ../../client/utils, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG runner fetching and saving static content to files
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: '../../router', '../../hono', '../../types', ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: Path manipulation utilities and route filtering for SSG
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming response helpers with SSE and text support
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: ../../utils/stream, './utils' (isOldBunVersion)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/streaming/utils.ts, ../../utils/stream/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Core streaming with TransformStream and
